MVP-53 runtime agent activation controller

Runtime Agent Control

A real backend-connected control surface for one supervised test agent only. Mass activation is blocked, the kill switch is visible, and every activation or deactivation writes an audit event.

MVP-53 Runtime Agent Activation Controller Supervised single-agent test Live runtime agents enabled: 0 Total registered agents: 47,979 Mass activation: blocked batch size = 1

Kill switch

Visible and ready

The kill switch is always visible. It does not unlock mass activation. It only controls the one supervised test agent.

Kill switch visible No activate-all route

Loading backend state...

Backend Status Panel

Persistence and runtime config

  • Backend functions respondLoading...
  • Live runtime agents enabled0
  • Total registered agents47,979
  • Mass activationblocked
  • Activation modeActivation mode: supervised single-agent test
  • Max batch size1
  • Kill switchvisible

Controlled Activation

One supervised test agent only

No activate-all route. Batch size is locked to 1. The only allowed target is mvp53_supervised_test_agent_001.

Disabled surface

What remains blocked

Mass activation: blocked No activate-all route No command execution No deploy execution No rollback execution No alert sending

Backend functions or Supabase environment variables are not configured yet. The UI is ready, but persistence requires Supabase URL and service-role key configured in Netlify environment variables.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Runtime agent control is limited to one supervised test agent. It does not enable command execution, deploy execution, rollback execution, alert sending, or mass activation.
